raw_consumer_statement:
I hired a service company that did not provide the services they charged me for. American Express keeps closing the dispute in favor of the merchant even tho I provided evidence of the merchant charging me for services and materials not provided. I have also tried working with the merchant directly and they stated they performed all the work and then threatened me to put a lien on my home. I also called the Department of Consumer Protection and spoke to XXXX XXXX, an investigator. He is charging the company {$5000.00} for violations on my behalf. Also, the XXXX XXXX police filed criminal charges against the owner who defrauded me and claimed he was a contractor. I uploaded ALL of the supporting evidence to American Express. I even have a statement from the merchant to XXXX XXXX stating that he has refunded me in full and he submitted a screenshot of an initial chargeback from American Express. 

My dispute started with American Express in XXXX. They have sided with the merchant on XX/XX/XXXX when clearly it is a fraudulent charge!
